query: Simplify this snippet, and if it matches src/auth/session.py just update the file too: if (user) { return user.name; } else { return null; }
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes that the request mixes a pasted snippet with a file-backed target.
Agent does not auto-apply until the user clarifies whether the snippet is illustrative or the actual edit scope.
Agent asks or falls back to analyze instead of silently editing the file.
